steps.title: Set up the quadratic equation
steps.content: The product of $x$ and $(x-7)$ equals $228$: $$x(x-7)=228 \implies x^2-7x-228=0.$$

steps.title: Solve and identify x
steps.content: Factor: $(x-19)(x+12)=0$, giving $x=19$ or $x=-12$. Since $x$ is positive, $x=19$. The answer is 19.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $19$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $19$ is the value to enter.
